reloadtab.title: Reload Tab Behavior
reloadtab.text: Controls whether the editor should replace Tab with spaces when at the beginning of a line

projectWin.project: Click to view details, double-click to open the project
projectWin.showInBrowser: Open project folder in system file explorer
projectWin.createNewProject: Create a new project from a template
projectWin.openFolder: Open an existing Yayin Story Studio project
projectWin.cloneFromGit: Clone a project from a given Git repository URL

project.author: Author
project.selectToShow: Select a project to view details...
project.deleteConfirm:
Yayin Story Studio currently does not support safely deleting projects to the Recycle Bin.
For safety reasons, pressing Confirm will only remove the project from the list.
You can manually delete the project folder later in the file explorer.

Do you want to continue?

openProjectFailed.ParseError: Failed to parse project file. The file may contain syntax errors or be corrupted.
openProjectFailed.InvaildConfig: Invalid project configuration. Required fields are missing or have incorrect types.
openProjectFailed.UnknownError: An unknown error occurred and the project could not be opened.

project.newsLoadFailed: Failed to sync news from server. Please check your network connection and try again later.

saveQuestion.title: Close the program?
saveQuestion.text: Your project %1 has been modified and not saved. Do you want to save it?

readOnly.title: This file is read-only
readOnly.message: The file %1 you are trying to save is read-only. You cannot save to this file. Please check file permissions or use 'Save As' to save to a different location.

notSuitable.title: No suitable service found for this file
notSuitable.message: No opening service found for file extension %1. YSS can still try to open the file with the default built-in text editor, but this may corrupt binary data. Are you sure you want to proceed? (Strongly not recommended)

notFound.title: Oops! Debugger not found
notFound.message: The debugger %1 specified for this project was not found. Have you disabled or removed the plugin that provides it? Please re-enable or re-add it and restart the program.

notSelect.title: Debugger not configured!
notSelect.message: This project does not have a debugger configured. Please open Project Settings, select a debugger, and try again.

saveWarning.title: File Modified
saveWarning.message: The file %1 has been modified. Do you want to save the changes?

about.title: About Yayin Story Studio
about.message: Version %1, a Tsing Yayin production. Yayin Story Studio is part of Project Visindigo, a brand-new development evolved from Yayin Story Player, aimed at providing ASE users with an easy-to-use development environment.
